issue_snippets.description: Using ElementTree to parse untrusted XML data is known to be vulnerable to XML attacks. Replace ElementTree with the equivalent defusedxml package, or make sure defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() is called.
issue_snippets.tool_snippet:
1 import json
2 from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
3 from urllib.parse import unquote

>>   2: from xml.etree import ElementTree as ET
